ccel.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

title: Letter LIV.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: To be laconic is not merely, as you suppose, to write few words, but to say a great deal in few words.
Thus I call Homer very brief and Antimachus lengthy.
Because I measure the length by the matter and not by the letters.
